no: Ports the Icewind Dale II PC voicesets to Enhanced Edition 2.6+ as selectable player character soundsets. Includes 12 class-based sets: 6 female and 6 male.
sum: Icewind Dale II Voice Pack for Infinity Engine Enhanced Edition games version 2.6 and above.

co.n: Icewind Dale II Voice Pack for EE 2.6+
co.tp2n: Icewind Dale II Voice Pack for EE 2.6+
